name: Bear Lake Village Cosier Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bear Lake Village Cosier Park in Bear Lake, MI! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: See Lakeside Pickleball on Facebook for current schedule.

name: Manistee Armory Youth Project
description: Manistee Armory Youth Project is a place to play pickleball in Manistee, MI. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Closed for summer season, May-October.  Players use Manistee Township courts in summer and access schedule at “Lakeside Pickleball” on Facebook.

name: Manistee Township Hall
description: Manistee Township Hall is a place to play pickleball in Manistee, MI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Onekama Consolidated Schools
description: Come play pickleball at Onekama Consolidated Schools in Onekama, MI! There are 2 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Pleasaanton Township Courts
description: Dual purpose court with 4 PB courts with permanent lines over 1 tennis court.  Portable nets and balls are on site, as well as port-a-jon.  Windscreens surround courts.  See “Lakeside Pickleball” on Facebook for weather & other announcements.  Players may access courts anytime, but are using Team Reach to assure at least 4 show up during organized meeting times.

name: Pleasant Valley Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Pleasant Valley Community Center in Arcadia, MI! There are 3 courts. 2 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Portage Lake Bible Camp
description: This indoor facility is open for PB only during winter months, Oct-April.  $5/session fee, or seasonal rate may apply.  See Lakeside Pickleball on Facebook for schedule.

name: The Woods
description: The Woods is a place to play pickleball in Wellston, MI. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.
